name: /doctor token-cost report includes a per-subagent context-cost line for every active subagent
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/agents && printf '{"agent":"pr-pattern-extractor","tokens":3500}\n{"agent":"compliance-specialist","tokens":2800}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/agents/cost-stats.jsonl && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/doctor.sh" --report token-cost --by subagent 2>out.txt && grep -q 'agent=pr-pattern-extractor tokens=3500' out.txt && grep -q 'agent=compliance-specialist tokens=2800' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
